title: alternanthera calcicola
intro: Alternanthera calcicola, also known as the green joy plant, is a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family that is native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alternanthera calcicola include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
